name: standards-refresh.sh emits the per-source rule_count and below-threshold sufficiency signal while still writing the file
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r28-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && [ -f $OUT/out/european-union/r28-src.yaml ] && grep -q 'sufficiency sid=r28-src rule_count=2 sufficiency=below-threshold-30' e.err && echo below-floor-fails-loud-still-writes 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
